column7: Enhances grain weight; precise N timing at PI stage maximizes harvest index.
Enhances early stand uniformity; balanced NPK improves crop establishment in varied soil conditions.
Supports grain protein synthesis at heading; combined N+S effect improves nutritional grain quality.
Reduces lodging at high yield levels; K strengthens cell walls and improves stalk diameter.
Supports high yield expression; iron component addresses potential micronutrient deficiencies in intensive paddy production.
Sea kelp provides natural cytokinins and auxins; promotes grain set and reduces unfilled spikelets at heading.
Organic acids chelate iron and zinc; improves micronutrient bioavailability in paddy soils under flooded conditions.
Green manure incorporation before transplanting improves soil biology; Azolla-derived N supports early hybrid vigor.
Water-soluble NPK improves nutrient use efficiency; foliar application reduces nutrient loss from flooded paddy soils.
